message:
perf(net,http): migrate TCP/Unix listeners, Unix stream, and HTTP client from std Mutex to parking_lot Mutex

Extends the parking_lot migration to the networking and HTTP client layers:

net/tcp/listener.rs:
- TcpListener registration: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- register_interest() .lock().expect("lock poisoned") → .lock()

net/unix/listener.rs:
- UnixListener registration: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- register_interest() removes .map_err poison-to-io::Error conversion;
  parking_lot never poisons so the error path is eliminated entirely.
- Test renamed: incoming_handles_poisoned_registration_lock →
  incoming_recovers_after_registration_lock_panic. With parking_lot,
  a panic while holding the lock does not poison it, so the next poll
  succeeds with Poll::Pending (re-registration works) instead of
  returning an io::Error.

net/unix/stream.rs:
- UnixStream registration: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- register_interest() and into_split() .lock().expect("lock poisoned")
  calls removed.

http/h1/http_client.rs:
- HttpClient pool: std::sync::Mutex → parking_lot::Mutex
- pool_stats() .lock().expect("pool lock") → .lock()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
